meaning: n.大鱼叉,帆船上缘的斜桁,鸡脚上的铁爪,<英俚>低级娱乐场所vt.用鱼叉捉,用鱼钩拖上来,欺骗vi.赌博(尤指小赌博)
examples: Get the trysail aft and bent, and lower down the gaff.
A mountaineer must learn to stand the gaff.
The bigger ones get hooked with a special gaff.
It was always charging around the gaff, or asleep, beside its mat at the back door.
She delivered a series of devastating elbows to Gaff's head before the bout was stopped.
